I

ImageUploadedTest() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.CreateEventActivityTest
test to see if an event created with a Image is uploads the link to the image and stores the image on the database
incrementWaitlistCount_increasesByOne() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.EventRepositoryTest
Verifies that incrementWaitlistCount increases the current waitlist count by one.
inputFieldsValidTest() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.CreateEventActivityTest
test to see if event creation is prevented when the input fields are missing information
isRequiresGeolocation() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.EventItem
getter for requiresGeolocation boolean
isWaitlistJoinOpen(boolean, Date, Date) - Static method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.EventRepository
returns whether the (is waitlist open and it is before the deadline)
isWaitlistJoinOpen_returnsFalse_whenDeadlinePassed() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.EventRepositoryTest
Verifies that the waitlist is considered closed when the registration deadline has already passed.
isWaitlistJoinOpen_returnsFalse_whenWaitlistClosed() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.EventRepositoryTest
Verifies that the waitlist is considered closed when the waitlist flag is false, even if the registration deadline is still in the future.
isWaitlistJoinOpen_returnsTrue_whenOpenAndDeadlineInFuture() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.EventRepositoryTest
Verifies that the waitlist is considered open when the waitlist flag is true and the registration deadline is in the future.
isWaitlistJoinOpen_returnsTrue_whenOpenAndDeadlineNull() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.EventRepositoryTest
Verifies that the waitlist is considered open when the waitlist flag is true and no registration deadline has been set.
isWaitlistOpen() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.EventItem
getter for waitlistOpen boolean
